title: Miss International 1989
summary: Miss International 1989, the 29th Miss International pageant, was held on 17 September 1989 at Kanazawa's Kagekiza. The pageant was hosted by Masumi Okada and the pageant won by Iris Klein of West Germany.
text:
Miss International 1989, the 29th Miss International pageant, was held on 17 September 1989 at Kanazawa's Kagekiza. The pageant was hosted by Masumi Okada and the pageant won by Iris Klein of West Germany.
